title: campanula filicaulis subsp. filicaulis
intro: Campanula filicaulis subsp. filicaulis, also known as the fringed bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Campanula filicaulis subsp. filicaulis include its ability to soothe sore throats and alleviate congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant often include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to relieve respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
